Fields.Name: Play Region ID Offset
Fields.Description: Multiplayer area ID offset. For example, if you enter 100, the multiplayer area ID will be offset by 100.

Fields.Name: Override Map Place Name ID
Fields.Description: Override the map name ID_place name display with the specified ID. -1: No overwrite, -2 or less, 0 or more: Overwrite the ID.

Fields.Name: Override Save Map Name ID
Fields.Description: Map name ID_Overwrites the save data display with the specified ID. -1: No overwrite, -2 or less, 0 or more: Overwrite the ID.
